_meta.name: Bandit — DPA Gap Checker
_meta.description: Checks Data Processing Agreements against a GDPR Article 28 clause checklist. Identifies missing mandatory clauses and generates a gap report.
_meta.status: PLACEHOLDER — import into n8n and configure credentials before use

_setup_instructions: 1. Import this file into n8n via Workflows > Import from File
2. Configure AI provider node with your credentials
3. Optionally connect to Google Drive to ingest DPA documents automatically
4. Trigger manually or via webhook with DPA text as input
_gdpr_art28_checklist: Appropriate technical and organisational security measures (Art. 32)
Sub-processor restrictions and prior written authorization
Assistance with security, breach notification, DPIA
Deletion or return of data at contract end
Provision of audit rights and information to demonstrate compliance

nodes.name: AI Model (configure provider here)
nodes.notes: Replace node type for OpenAI, Google Gemini, Mistral, or Ollama

nodes.name: Compute Gap Score
nodes.notes: Calculates % clause coverage and flags missing mandatory Art. 28 clauses

nodes.name: Save Gap Report
nodes.notes: Saves gap report as Google Doc. See /integrations/google-drive-setup.md
